channel.title: AI Builder's Field Guide — Recently Added
channel.description: A daily-curated wiki of the tools, models, and patterns that AI power-users and builders actually reach for.

item.title: Hermes Agent
item.description: Hermes Agent is an open-source framework for building self-improving AI agents designed for long-term, personalized collaboration. — It emphasizes reliability and self-evolving skills, allowing agents to learn from feedback and adapt over time, contrasting with agents requiring constant manual refinement.

item.title: Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description: The Microsoft Agent Framework is an open, multi-language framework for building and orchestrating production-grade AI agents and multi-agent workflows. — It provides a consistent foundation for agent systems across Python and .NET, supporting various LLM ecosystems for developers taking agents from prototype to production.

item.title: Helicone
item.description: Helicone provides logging, monitoring, and debugging for large language model applications to help builders understand and optimize their AI usage. — It offers detailed insights into LLM calls, including latency and cost, providing a more focused observability solution than broader eval platforms.

item.title: OpenSwarm
item.description: OpenSwarm is an open-source multi-agent system that orchestrates specialized AI agents to create diverse deliverables from a single terminal prompt. — Unlike single-agent coding tools, OpenSwarm coordinates multiple specialist agents for tasks beyond code, such as research, documents, and media generation.

item.title: Suno v5
item.description: Suno v5 is an AI music generation tool that creates full-length tracks with human-like vocals across various genres. — This tool allows creators to produce original, royalty-free music efficiently, providing a cost-effective alternative to traditional music production.

item.title: Baton
item.description: Baton is a desktop application that provides a unified interface for developing and managing multiple AI coding agents and their associated worktrees. — It simplifies the orchestration of several AI coding agents, offering a more organized and efficient workflow compared to manually managing them across disparate development environments.

item.title: Statewright
item.description: Statewright utilizes visual state machines to enhance the reliability of AI agents by formally restricting their tool access, iteration limits, and valid transitions within a workflow. — This approach improves agent reliability by reducing the problem complexity for smaller models, offering an alternative to relying on larger models or extensive prompting for robust agent behavior.

item.title: MemPalace
item.description: Open-source local AI memory system — stores conversation history as verbatim text with semantic retrieval. — Hits 96.6% R@5 on LongMemEval with zero API calls. If you want agent memory that doesn't leak to a vendor, this is the open-source baseline.
